meaning: n.Yugoslavia 瑗垮崡閮ㄧ殑鍦版柟
examples: Serbia and Montenegro has an estimated population of 10.8 million.
Montenegro and Croatia may ask the court to examine an old border dispute.
Montenegro is way ahead of Serbia in progress towards joining the European Union.
In Montenegro, Magyar was charged with paying officials to help secure more favourable contracts.
Victoria Montenegro was raised as the daughter of a colonel, a man she adored.
